meaning: v.(使)得到休养,(使)得到娱乐
examples: The museum attempts to recreate the sights and sounds of wartime Britain.
They wanted to recreate the ability of lotus leaves to resist water.
I am trying to recreate family life far from home.
He denied, though, that the effect would be to recreate the old client-patron arrangements.
They need to recreate what we did here with the NASDAQ beginning in 1971.
